description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a vibrant orange exterior, commonly used for organizing documents. The front face features a large white label area for easy identification and a circular metal ring, likely for pulling the cabinet from a shelf. The sides and back are plain, with a smooth, unadorned finish. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from sturdy cardboard or thin metal, with a glossy coating for durability and aesthetics. The object is designed to be placed upright, with its main access on the narrow face. Its compact size and lightweight build make it suitable for use in offices or archives where space efficiency is important.
description: A tall, orange filing cabinet with a label area and pull ring, designed for document storage. Its smooth, glossy finish and compact form make it ideal for office or archive use.
description_view_0: Narrow face with a large white label area and a circular metal pull ring, indicating the main access side.
description_view_1: Plain, solid orange side panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow face with a large white label area and a circular pull ring, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: Plain, solid orange side panel, identical to view 1 with no distinguishing features.
